title: Union Health Minister Launches Indigenous Tetanus and Adult Diphtheria Vaccine
summary: Union Health Minister Shri Jagat Prakash Nadda launched India's indigenously manufactured Tetanus and Adult Diphtheria (Td) vaccine. The launch occurred at Himachal Pradesh's Central Research Institute. This milestone furthers national self-reliance in vaccine production. The Td vaccine strengthens India's immunization program, protecting adults and adolescents from these diseases. This initiative ensures accessible, life-saving vaccines for all citizens, upholding public health.

title: Union Health Minister Launches Indigenous Td Vaccine in Himachal Pradesh
summary: Union Health Minister Shri Jagat Prakash Nadda launched an indigenous Tetanus and Adult Diphtheria (Td) vaccine at Himachal Pradesh’s Central Research Institute. This enhances India's public health self-reliance, boosting domestic vaccine production. Crucial for preventing tetanus and diphtheria, it benefits millions. The initiative underscores the Ministry's commitment to strengthening pharmaceutical capacities, ensuring wider access to essential immunizations and bolstering national health security.

title: Union Health Minister Launches Indigenous Tetanus-Diphtheria Vaccine
summary: Union Health Minister Shri Jagat Prakash Nadda launched an indigenously manufactured Tetanus and Adult Diphtheria (Td) vaccine at Himachal Pradesh's Central Research Institute. This initiative significantly boosts India's self-reliance in vaccine production and strengthens public health infrastructure. The new Td vaccine will bolster the national immunization program, providing crucial protection against Tetanus and Diphtheria for adults, enhancing healthcare capabilities and vaccine accessibility nationwide.
